{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322023656C2054BA6551060FC15A0"}"},"total":54},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7408699830180922136","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好很带感，女主吃的太好了哈哈，像作者说的，万草丛中过片叶不沾身，男人嘛，不合适了就换，就像衣服，有时候突然喜欢这个颜色这个款，就买，过段时间会有新的衣服，更符合你的口味，换了就是。现代快餐时代，本来就很少有青梅竹马修成正果的，相识相知相爱的过程都很快，根本没有时间精力去多了解，分的也自然快，所以呢，珍惜当下，享受当下，该吃就吃[奸笑]","text_exts":[{"e":108,"s":104,"text":"青梅竹马","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%9D%92%E6%A2%85%E7%AB%B9%E9%A9%AC&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177411821660FC15A0%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227408699830180922136%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227180689993344486452%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%9D%92%E6%A2%85%E7%AB%B9%E9%A9%AC%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1724979833,"group_id":"7180689993344486452","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/cUU0du/9g57CwDCPw2GJ8=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"111637655623","user_name":"东社平原的易云"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111637655623","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1645410240,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7180689993344486452","book_info":{"abstract":"【校园】【财阀大小姐】【无CP爽文】
女主出生在超级豪门+顶级书香世家，拥有一张万人迷的脸。
无奈青梅竹马只喜欢喝绿茶，
被伤透了心后，索性开了鱼塘！
她给的实在是太多
鱼挤死了都不想出去！！！

某天两家解除婚约消息传出
别墅外立即被风格各异的帅哥堵着
一阵狂风呼啸而来，出现驾驶直升机全副武装的男人，楼下的男人们直呼不讲男德。
女人站在楼顶灿然一笑，还有帅气的男网友可以来解救自己......
第二天各大新闻头条：某影帝、某知名大网红、某集团总裁、某著名作家.....齐聚某富人区高档海景别墅外坐了整整一夜！
